title: Reliable Runtime
scope: End-to-end durable task execution system with inbox integration, state machine, and automated recovery

stories.title: Task Orchestrator Basic State Machine + Request Queue
stories.description: Create durable task state management for agent_tasks table, state machine, and inbox integration. No S3/S4/S5 code.

stories.title: Task Workspace — Checkpoint Paths, Plan/Progress File Management
stories.description: Implement checkpoint paths, plan/progress file management, and workspace state persistence.

stories.title: Checkpoint Manager
stories.description: S4 checkpoint manager only: save/load/list checkpoints, corrupt JSON behavior, secret redaction, workspace checkpoint paths. No S5 auto-resume, no MCP reconnect, no Ralph-lite runner.
evidence: resource_preflight: pass at acceptance time; RAM available 816 MB, disk 77%, load 0.26/0.16/0.11
PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_checkpoint_manager.py -q --no-cov: 7 passed in 0.05s

stories.title: Resource Guard / Low-RAM Execution Mode
stories.description: Preflight guard for stories, targeted tests, migrations, gateway restarts, model probes, and reviewer calls. Blocks unsafe RAM/disk/load/gateway/cost states before autonomous work.
evidence: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_resource_guard.py -q --no-cov: 10 passed in 0.04s
PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_resource_guard.py tests/unit/test_checkpoint_manager.py -q --no-cov: 17 passed in 0.10s
live CLI reviewer_call: blocked because daily_cost_total_usd 2.1604 > 2.0000
live CLI targeted_tests: allowed with swap warning

stories.title: Source Ingestion — Telegram, n8n, API Webhooks
stories.description: Integrate source ingestion from Telegram, n8n, and API webhooks into inbox.

stories.title: Ralph — Autonomous Task Runner (Phase 10 S8 replacement)
stories.description: Lightweight autonomous runner: ResourceGuard preflight → dequeue → priority gate → GatewayClient (FREE_MODELS only) → complete/fail/retry → TelegramNotifier. Replaces original S8 monitoring story as higher-value deliverable.
evidence: Autonomy constraint: only low/normal auto-processed; critical/high → pause+notify

stories.title: Task Priority Queue — Dynamic Reordering, User Override
stories.description: Implement dynamic priority queue with user override and priority inheritance.
evidence: reprioritize(task_id, new_priority, actor) method added to TaskOrchestrator
inbox_reprioritize MCP tool registered in brain_mcp_server.py
S9 audit hook fires on every reprioritize call

stories.title: Retry Policy Engine — Exponential Backoff, Max Retries, Circuit Breaker
stories.description: Build retry policy engine with exponential backoff, max retries, and circuit breaker.
evidence: fail() computes retry_after = NOW() + 30s * 2^retry_count, capped at 3600s
dequeue() WHERE clause: retry_after IS NULL OR retry_after <= NOW()
DB migration: retry_after TIMESTAMPTZ + error_text TEXT columns added

stories.title: Task Monitoring — Dashboard, Alerts, Health Metrics
stories.description: Add monitoring dashboard, alerts, and health metrics for task execution.
evidence: queue_metrics() returns by_status, by_priority, stuck_running, pending_retry, next_retry_at, total
task_alerts() MCP tool: stuck/backlog/failure/backoff alert codes with severity

stories.title: Audit Trail — Immutable Log, User Actions, System Events
stories.description: Implement immutable audit trail for user actions and system events.
evidence: _audit() helper writes to task_audit_log table (non-fatal on missing table)
Hooks in: enqueue, create_task, dequeue, checkpoint, resume, complete, fail, pause, reprioritize
DB migration: task_audit_log table + indexes created

stories.title: Final Integration — End-to-End Test, CI/CD, Documentation
stories.description: Run end-to-end test, integrate CI/CD pipeline, and finalize documentation.
evidence: 65/65 total unit tests passed across all Phase 10 stories (23 DB-integration skipped)
brain_mcp_server.py: 4 new MCP tools — inbox_reprioritize, queue_metrics, audit_trail, task_alerts
